admin.title: Interlockings
admin.subtitle: Catalogue of interlockings in the system. Assign interlockings to layouts from the layout editor.

delete.title: Delete interlocking "{{name}}"
delete.message: This operation is irreversible. The interlocking will be removed from every layout it was assigned to.

fields.name: Name
fields.locationHelp: A short description of where or what the interlocking covers.

admin.empty: There are no interlockings to display.

view.signalmanOnlyHint: Only signalmen of this layout can occupy or leave the interlocking.

setup.selectCommandStation: Pick a command station to show in-motion chips on the roster.

announcements.title: Train announcements
announcements.empty: No announcements configured for this interlocking.

roster.title: Layout consists
roster.empty: No vehicles or trains on the layout roster.

actions.stopHint: Stop this consist only (not the whole layout)

stopConfirm.title: Stop consist?
stopConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to emergency-stop {{target}}? Only this consist will be stopped.

stopError.not_authorized_to_stop: You are not allowed to stop this consist.
stopError.vehicle_is_dummy: This consist has no DCC address assigned.
stopError.vehicle_not_on_layout: This consist is not on the layout.

takeoverError.error: Failed to send the takeover request.
takeoverError.not_signalman: You do not have signalman permissions.
takeoverError.not_interlocking_occupant: You must staff the interlocking to take over control.
takeoverError.takeover_target_not_on_layout: This consist is not on the layout.
takeoverError.takeover_not_owner: You cannot take over your own consist.
takeoverError.takeover_already_pending: A takeover request for this consist is already pending.
takeoverError.takeover_invalid_state: The takeover request is in an invalid state.
takeoverError.takeover_failed: Failed to send the takeover request.
takeoverError.ack_timeout: The server did not respond in time.

takeover.stopBeforeClose: Stop the consist (speed 0) before releasing control.
takeover.noDccTarget: This consist has no DCC address assigned.
takeover.waitingMessage: Takeover request sent. The driver has {{seconds}} s to reject it. After that, control is taken over automatically.
takeover.rejectedToast: The driver rejected the takeover request.

displace.title: Interlocking already staffed
displace.message: This interlocking is currently staffed by {{login}}. Do you want to displace them and take over?

leaveGuard.title: Leave the interlocking?
leaveGuard.message: You are staffing this interlocking. If you continue, your signalman session here will end.

view.displacedToast: Another signalman has displaced you from this interlocking.
